intro: Pteroceras vriesii, also known as the Vries' orchid, is a rare species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health issues, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Pteroceras vriesii include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which are believed to be responsible for its medicinal properties.
